title: cystopteris diaphana
intro: Cystopteris diaphana, also known as the Delicate Lady Fern or Diaphanous Cystopteris, is a species of fern native to North America. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin infections. The health benefits of Cystopteris diaphana include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote tissue repair, and aid in the healing process. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and promote wound healing.
